title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Manappuram Finance Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Manappuram Finance Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, Manappuram Finance Global Group in Agra is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Manappuram Finance Global Group:
Manappuram Finance Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manappuram Finance Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
